race.comment: The penny has dropped for the well-related EVERYBODY RISE (1) (full to 2xG1 winner Russian Revolution) who has strung three wins together on the bounce since joining the new stable and is racing high on confidence of late. Hard to ignore winning form and rates the testing material against this line-up. VORKUTA (5) has placed over this track and trip and handles all surfaces. Was a dominant winner last start and can go back-to-back without surprising. MISS DE MEDICI (9) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race like this. Can feature while fresh. IMMORTALITY (4) draws the inside marble and looks one for the multiples.
